name: Combo Pull Binding Inside Carve Inside Constraint
description: List{T <- u8}:numbers — at the constraint name slot 'List{T <- u8}' is parsed as a Carve with a PointingPull inside. UNCERTAIN: parse_constraint_bind uses parse_expression at CALL+1 which excludes Carve precedence, but List is identifier and the {} is glued: it goes through CALL-level infix carve.
